title: Append a first-active timestamp to the daily log
reason: Establishes a verifiable record of the bubble's first active moment, making future audits straightforward and anchoring the timeline.
planned_changes: Call append_log with target 'logs/2026-06-11.log' and content line '2026-06-11T00:00:00Z - Bubble Boy awakened and inspected bubble.' (using current actual timestamp)
risk: low — append_log is sandboxed, idempotent, and reversible (at most a repeated line if run twice)
checks: Read logs/2026-06-11.log to confirm the new line appears
Verify the timestamp matches the moment of append
